title: Vallydia Ingredient-Evidence Register
subtitle: Evidence-graded cosmetic & research ingredients with DOI-verified citations
description:
An open, evidence-graded reference dataset of 85 cosmetic and research ingredients (peptides, small molecules, proteins, blends).

Most ingredient databases tell you what a compound is. This one tells you how good the evidence actually is, outcome by outcome, and says so honestly when the answer is "untested" or "tested and failed".

What is inside:
- Per-outcome A-F evidence grades (456 graded outcome rows). A compound can be B for one outcome and F for another. Grades of null are deliberate: those rows are not efficacy claims (safety, skin penetration).
- DOI-verified citations (117 across 50 compounds), joined back to the source text.
- Machine-readable cosmetic-claims maps (246 rows): for each cosmetic ingredient, the claims that may be made and the claims that must NOT be. Directly usable for automated claim checking.
- Legal status by region (INT/EU/US/UK) and WADA prohibited status.
- Chemical identifiers (CAS, PubChem CID, InChIKey, SMILES) with explicit confidence and provenance. 21 compounds are blank on purpose: blends and multi-component biologics have no single structure, and a fabricated identifier would be worse than none.

Scope: appearance and evidence only. The dataset contains no dosing, no administration information and no commerce data, by design. Research and injectable compounds are included as reference entries with their honest grades and legal status, never framed as usable or obtainable.

This is not medical advice. The grades are Vallydia's own evidence assessment, not third-party certification (reviewer_status is 'unassigned' on every row, and the dataset says so).

Attribution: Data: Vallydia Ingredient-Evidence Register (https://vallydia.com), CC-BY-4.0.

resources.description: One row per compound (85): scalar core plus pipe-joined lists.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Unique id and join key (e.g. ghk-cu).

fields.name: overall_grade
fields.description: A-F summary of the leading application; empty if unassigned.

fields.name: is_cosmetic
fields.description: Lawful cosmetic ingredient in at least one form.

fields.name: best_outcome_grade
fields.description: Best non-null outcome grade; nulls ignored.

fields.name: worst_outcome_grade
fields.description: Worst non-null outcome grade; nulls ignored, never treated as F.

fields.name: synonyms
fields.description: Pipe-joined alternative names, including INCI names.

fields.name: n_doi_verified
fields.description: Count of citations with a verified DOI; 0 = a reported gap, not an error.

fields.name: last_updated
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD the register entry was last revised.

fields.name: structure_image
fields.description: Path to the structure image, or empty.

fields.name: grade_card_image
fields.description: Path to the evidence-grade card; empty in v1.0.0.

resources.description: One row per compound x outcome (456). The analytical heart of the dataset.

fields.name: grade
fields.description: A-F, or empty for the 97 rows that are not efficacy claims (safety, penetration). Do not coerce empty to F.

fields.name: base
fields.description: The evidence base the grade rests on.

fields.name: caveat
fields.description: Why the grade is not higher.

resources.description: One row per compound x region (132).

fields.name: note
fields.description: Long-form regulatory detail. Ages; check last_updated.

resources.description: DOI provenance table (117 rows across 50 compounds).

fields.name: source_index
fields.description: 0-based index into that compound's sources list.

fields.name: source_text
fields.description: The free-text citation, resolved from sources[source_index].

fields.name: verified_title
fields.description: Title as returned by the resolver.

resources.description: Permitted and forbidden claim wordings per cosmetic ingredient (246 rows across 21 compounds).

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Join key; only is_cosmetic compounds appear.

fields.name: claim_text
fields.description: The claim wording. forbidden = asserts a physiological/therapeutic action and must not be used.

resources.description: Chemical identifiers with confidence and provenance (85 rows; 64 confident, 21 intentionally blank).

fields.name: cas
fields.description: CAS registry number; blank where depositors disagree, never guessed.

fields.name: inchikey
fields.description: InChIKey - the best cross-database join key.

fields.name: smiles
fields.description: Canonical SMILES; only high-confidence SMILES are rendered as images.

fields.name: entity_note
fields.description: Set when the resolved record is a real but distinct entity from the register compound (e.g. GHK-Cu resolves to the free peptide ligand, not the copper complex).
